results.title: Danaher Schedules First Quarter 2026 Earnings Conference Call
results.snippet: Danaher Corporation (NYSE: DHR) announced that it will webcast its quarterly earnings conference call for the first quarter 2026 on Tuesday, April 21, 2026 beginning at 8:00 a.m. ET.

results.title: Danaher Gears Up to Post Q1 Earnings: What Lies Ahead
results.snippet: Danaher is scheduled to release first-quarter 2026 results on April 21 before market open. The consensus estimate is $1.94 EPS on $5.99 billion in revenue, indicating year-over-year growth.

results.title: Press Releases - Danaher Investor Relations
results.snippet: The company will report Q1 2026 earnings on April 21, 2026 via webcast. Historical press releases and upcoming event details are available on the investor site.

results.title: Danaher (DHR) Earnings: Latest Report, Earnings Call Transcript
results.snippet: Danaher last reported Q4 2025 earnings on January 28, 2026 with EPS of $2.23 beating estimates. Q1 2026 results are scheduled for release in April 2026.

results.title: Danaher Corporation Investors - Quarterly Earnings
results.snippet: View Danaher's quarterly earnings materials and reports. The first quarter 2026 earnings conference call is set for April 21, 2026.

results.title: AACR Annual Meeting 2026 | Danaher Life Sciences
results.snippet: Meet Danaher at AACR 2026 in San Diego from April 17-22 at booth 4217 to explore posters, spatial biology, and oncology insights.

results.title: Analytica 2026 Event | Danaher Life Sciences
results.snippet: Danaher is participating in Analytica 2026 in Munich from March 24-27, featuring talks, posters, and advanced life science solutions at Hall A3 Booth 302.

results.title: Register for AACR 2026 | Danaher Life Sciences
results.snippet: Plan to meet Danaher at the AACR Annual Meeting 2026 in San Diego from April 17-22 at Booth 4217 for discussions on life sciences innovations.

results.title: Danaher forecasts 2026 profit in line with estimates on pharma spending recovery
results.snippet: Danaher expects fiscal 2026 adjusted earnings of $8.35 to $8.50 per share, aligning with analyst estimates, and forecasts core revenue growth of 3% to 6% as pharmaceutical market conditions improve.

results.title: Danaher (DHR) Projects 2026 Revenue Growth at TD Cowen 46th Annual Health Care Conference
results.snippet: At the TD Cowen conference, Danaher projected 3%-6% revenue growth for 2026 driven by bioprocessing along with 100-basis-point operating margin expansion.

results.title: Danaher (DHR) Stock Forecast and Price Target 2026
results.snippet: According to 21 analysts, Danaher (DHR) has an average 12-month price target of $247.35 for 2026, implying a 27.91% upside with a high of $275 and low of $220.

results.title: What to Expect From Danaher Corporation's Q1 2026 ...
results.snippet: Analysts project Danaher's EPS at $8.40 for fiscal 2026 with a Strong Buy consensus from 22 analysts and an average price target of $264 indicating 38% upside.
